info.title: Cleanway API
info.description: Phishing protection API. Checks domains for safety. Your browsing data lives on your device — we only see domain names.

post.description:
Check one or more domains for phishing/safety.

Speed tiers:
  - Cached: <1ms (Redis)
  - Allowlisted: <1ms (Tranco 100K, no API calls)
  - Full analysis: 2-5s (14 parallel checks)

Privacy: only domain names processed. Full URLs never logged.
Create a Stripe Checkout session for subscription.
Create Stripe Customer Portal link for managing subscription.

Submit weekly aggregate numbers from device.
Called once per week by the extension/app.
Server stores ONLY numbers — no URLs, no details.

get.description:
Get user's percentile ranking based on weekly blocks.
"Safer than X% of users" — computed from all users' aggregates.

post.description:
Sync security score NUMBER from device.
Score is CALCULATED on device. Server stores the number only.
Details/breakdown stay on device.
Register or update device for multi-device sync.

Report a false positive (safe site flagged) or false negative (phishing not caught).
Stored for ML model retraining and manual review.
Add a domain to user's personal whitelist (always marked safe).

get.description:
Public domain safety check. No auth required.
Rate limited by IP (10/min). Used for SEO pages and embeds.
Returns simplified result without full analysis (fast, no external API calls).
Global platform statistics for landing page and social proof.

k-anonymity breach check.

Send first 5 characters of SHA-1(email) hash.
Returns list of matching hash suffixes with breach counts.
Client compares locally — we never see your full hash.

Check if a domain has been involved in known data breaches.
Uses HIBP v3 API (requires API key for this endpoint).
Falls back to basic info without key.

post.description: Generate unique referral code for user.
Redeem a referral code. Gives 7-day Personal trial to redeemer + 7 days to referrer.
Create a new organization. Requires business tier.

get.description:
Organization threat dashboard.
Shows aggregate stats — individual user data is NOT visible to admins.

post.description:
Launch phishing simulation campaign.

Templates:
  - generic_phishing: "Your account will be suspended"
  - credential_harvest: Fake login page
  - invoice_scam: Fake invoice attachment
  - ceo_fraud: "CEO" requests urgent wire transfer

Privacy: simulations only target verified org member emails.
Results track who clicked/reported — for training, not punishment.

get.description: List all phishing simulation campaigns for this org.

Return pricing for all plans (personal, family, business) × intervals (monthly, yearly)
for the given country's PPP tier.

parameters.name: cc

schema.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Omit for default tier 2 (base) pricing.
schema.title: Cc

parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Omit for default tier 2 (base) pricing.

get.description: Full tier reference — which countries are in each tier + base prices.
Health check that verifies dependencies and circuit breaker states.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Display price in USD (monthly or yearly total)

stripe_price_id.title: Stripe Price Id
stripe_price_id.description: Stripe price ID for checkout session

PricePoint.title: PricePoint
PricePoint.description: One price (monthly or yearly) for a single plan in a single tier.

country.title: Country
country.description: Echoed ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (uppercased). None when no cc was provided.

blocking_is_free_forever.title: Blocking Is Free Forever
blocking_is_free_forever.description: Ethical invariant: scam site blocking never requires payment. Always true.

free_threat_threshold.title: Free Threat Threshold
free_threat_threshold.description: Number of detailed threat explanations given free. After this, paywall gates the DETAILS (not the block itself).

countries.title: Countries
countries.description: List of ISO country codes, or a human-readable note for tier 2 (default).
